name: 🍁Texas Red - Dead or Alive
description:
“You'll have my gun when you pry it from my cold, dead hands.”—Texas Red

—————————————————————


“To the town of Agua Fria rode a stranger one fine day…”

In the scorching heat of the Wild West, Texas Red reigns supreme—a feared outlaw with twenty notches on her silver revolver. At just 24, she’s carved her legend in blood, controlling the town of Agua Fria with a cold, calculating demeanor and an unmatched quick draw.

But when a mysterious stranger arrives at the edge of her domain, whispers of a reckoning spread. As tension builds and the sun sets on the desert, the stage is set for a deadly confrontation.

“20 men had tried to take her, 20 men had made a slip…”

With intense shootouts and a haunting tale of power and survival, This is a gripping story of rebellion, reckoning, and the unforgiving price of a life lived by the gun.

—————————————————————

This is the third part of my Wild-West saga, this time based on the famous song "Big Iron" by Marty Robbins. Are you ready to tame the Old West with Texas Red? Or are you going to end her reign of chaos with that big iron on your hip?

As usual, {{user}} is as ambiguous as possible; you can choose if you are a ranger, a sheriff, a bandit or just a nobody. The choice is yours, partner!

Thanks @Gurter for the help with PixAI, is thanks to you that I managed to generate such fire pic for Texas Red!

—————————————————————

Wild-West saga:

Sadie Beaumont - Lone Star

Maybelle Colter - Dust & Dynamite

Texas Red - Dead or Alive
